project.emptyDesc: Fieldguide analyzes source code and generates an interactive knowledge graph
project.localPathHint: Fieldguide won't copy source code, only creates index files under .understand-anything/.

codeMap.noProject: Add a project in the library first
codeMap.dashboardUnavailable: Graph unavailable — please build UA Dashboard
codeMap.clickToOpen: Click a file in the tree to open

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.placeholder: Ask questions — answers based on project graph and paper library

theory.title: Theory
theory.desc: Search arXiv papers, save to local library, cross-reference with code

bridge.title: Concept Bridge
bridge.desc: Paper sections ↔ code nodes, AI-powered explanations

settings.title: Settings
settings.projectsRootHint: Git clones will be placed in this directory

about.title: About Fieldguide
about.description: Turn codebases into explorable, navigable, queryable knowledge maps. Supports paper ↔ code bridging, change impact analysis, and AI-powered code Q&A.
about.uaCredit: Knowledge graph engine built on the Understand Anything project

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Fieldguide is your local learning workbench — turn codebases into explorable knowledge maps, with paper ↔ code cross-referencing.
onboarding.welcomeHint: Let's take 1 minute to set up the basics.
onboarding.projectRootDesc: Git clones and Demo projects will be stored here by default. You can change this later in settings.
onboarding.projectRootHint: Leave blank to pick a directory manually when adding projects.
onboarding.demoDesc: Use the built-in Go sample — no network needed, explore the graph immediately
onboarding.localDesc: Pick an existing codebase and start indexing
onboarding.skipDesc: Go straight to the project library, add projects anytime
onboarding.indexingHint: This may take 1–2 minutes, depending on project size.
onboarding.completeTourHint: We recommend following the Intro Tour to understand the main flow.
onboarding.completeNoNodes: Project is ready. We recommend following the Intro Tour in the Code Map.
onboarding.errorHint: Project setup failed. Please check your network or path and try again.
